rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"lesson","text":"Always verify the reported bug still exists before making changes; the fix was already in git state, requiring no code change.","scope":"src/utils/helpers.ts"},{"kind":"convention","text":"hotfix pipeline COMPLEXITY_SKIP=[\"taskify\",\"plan\",\"review\",\"review-fix\"] — only build/verify/ship run, tests skipped","scope":"kody pipeline"}]}
